tutorial.orGoToLobby: Or go back to the lobby
tutorial._placeOnBorder: Place on the border to defend!
tutorial._welcome_intro: Tiao (跳, Chinese for "jump") is a two-player strategy game where you capture pieces by jumping over them.
tutorial._welcome_details: It's played on a 19×19 grid — the same as a Go board. First to capture 10 enemy pieces wins. White always moves first.
tutorial._place_desc: Each turn you either place a new piece on an empty spot or jump an enemy to capture it. Place a white piece anywhere on the board!
tutorial._jump_desc: Select your white piece, then click where to land. You'll leap over the enemy and capture it!
tutorial._chain_desc: After jumping, if you can jump again — keep going! Chain captures for a devastating combo, then confirm. You can also stop early if you prefer.
tutorial._confirmUndo_desc: After a chain, you might change your mind. Undo your last jump with the red ✗, then confirm to keep the rest!
tutorial._borderBasic_desc: The thick edge is the board's border. You can't place on the edge unless an enemy could jump there. Try the corner — it's blocked! Then place on the legal edge spot where White threatens.
tutorial._borderBasic_error: No enemy can reach this edge!
tutorial._borderChain_desc: Even if the enemy needs multiple jumps to reach an edge, you can still place there to defend. Follow the arrows — White can chain-jump to the corner, so Black can block it!
tutorial._clusterBasic_desc: A connected group of same-color stones can't grow past 10. Try adding to this cluster of 10 — it's blocked! Then place elsewhere.
tutorial._clusterBasic_error: That cluster already has 10 — can't add more!
tutorial._clusterDiagonal_desc: Clusters only count orthogonal connections (up, down, left, right). Diagonal neighbors are not connected — so you can place diagonally next to a group of 10!
tutorial._clusterMerge_desc: Connecting two smaller clusters into one bigger than 10 is allowed! The rule only blocks adding to a cluster that's already at 10. Place between these two groups!
tutorial._clusterEnemy_desc: The cluster rule only applies to your own color. You can always place next to enemy clusters, no matter how big they are!
tutorial._clusterJump_desc: Jump endpoints can grow a cluster beyond 10! The cluster rule only applies to placement, not to where your pieces land after a jump.
tutorial._summary_ready: Time to put your skills to the test!
tutorial._summary_ruleGeneralDesc: 19×19 grid, starts empty, White moves first
tutorial._summary_ruleWinDesc: First to capture 10 enemy pieces wins
tutorial._summary_rulePlaceDesc: Put a piece on an empty spot
tutorial._summary_ruleJumpDesc: Leap over enemy to capture, jumps can be chained
tutorial._summary_ruleUndoDesc: Hover over jump start, then red ✗ to undo
tutorial._summary_ruleClusterDesc: Can't connect to existing cluster with 10+ stones
tutorial._summary_ruleBorderDesc: Can only place on border to defend from enemy jump

creator.ricoBio: Rico is a full-stack software engineer based in Berlin who built this digital version of Tiao. He's passionate about crafting polished web experiences with a love for real-time multiplayer systems. Outside of coding, Rico writes a blog and newsletter called <liveAndLearn>Live and Learn</liveAndLearn>, creates mathematical art like <fractalGarden>Fractal Garden</fractalGarden>, and is always exploring new ideas at the intersection of technology and creativity.
creator.andreasBio: Andreas is a game developer from Germany and the brilliant mind behind Tiao. With a passion for board games and game design, he created the original concept that became this digital adaptation. When he's not crafting elegant game mechanics, Andreas works as a C++ application programmer at Ubisoft, where he's contributed to titles like <nexus>Assassin's Creed Nexus</nexus> and <avatar>Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora</avatar>. He's also an astronomy and space flight nerd who plays drums and guitar.

og.siteDescription: A beautiful abstract strategy board game. Play online with friends, against AI, or over the board.
og.lobbyDescription: Jump into a match online, challenge friends, or play against AI. A beautiful abstract strategy board game with Go-board aesthetics.
og.tutorialDescription: Master the rules of Tiao in minutes. Learn how to place, jump, chain captures, and use the border and cluster rules.
og.friendsDescription: Find players, send friend requests, and invite your friends to a game of Tiao.
og.tournamentsDescription: Browse and join Tiao tournaments. Compete in round-robin, elimination, or group stage formats.
og.profileDescription: Manage your Tiao account, display name, profile picture, and badges.
og.gamesDescription: View your active games and match history on Tiao.
og.computerDescription: Challenge the AI at different difficulty levels. Practice your strategy offline with no time pressure.
og.localDescription: Play Tiao over the board with a friend on the same screen.
og.matchmakingDescription: Find a random opponent online. Pick a time control and start playing.
og.gameActive: {white} vs {black} -- live match on a {boardSize}x{boardSize} board
og.gameDescription: Watch or join this Tiao game. {boardSize}x{boardSize} board, first to {scoreToWin} captures.
og.tournamentDetailDescription: {playerCount} players competing in a {format} tournament on Tiao.
og.publicProfileDescription: View {name}'s player profile, match history, and stats on Tiao.
